summary: Tested 6 issues fixed in Finance Center app. All backend tests pass (11/11). Fixed timezone bug in /licenses/{id}/projections endpoint. Frontend verification confirms Issue 2 (Commission Field) and Issue 6 (Monthly Summary Card) are working correctly.

fixed_by_testing_agent.issue: TypeError: can't compare offset-naive and offset-aware datetimes - Fixed by handling date-only strings (YYYY-MM-DD) with timezone

issues: Chart width/height warnings when container not visible - cosmetic only

test_results.issue_1_admin_approval: VERIFIED - No admin approval required for trade adjustments (was already not present)
test_results.issue_2_commission_field: VERIFIED - Commission input field present in Adjust Trade dialog with data-testid='enter-ap-commission-input'
test_results.issue_3_licensee_balance: VERIFIED - /api/admin/licenses/{id}/projections endpoint returns correct projections with accumulated balance (after timezone fix)
test_results.issue_4_auto_enter_trade: VERIFIED - Code implementation confirms auto-enter when timer hits 0, with localStorage persistence for 2 hours
test_results.issue_5_balance_with_commission: VERIFIED - Trade logs include commission field, balance calculation includes commission
test_results.issue_6_monthly_summary_card: VERIFIED - Daily Projection dialog shows Monthly Target ($5,357.36), Current Profit ($2,658.06), Total Commission ($0.00)

context_for_next_testing_agent: All 6 issues verified working. Fixed a timezone bug in the new /licenses/{id}/projections endpoint. The Commission field in Adjust Trade dialog uses data-testid='enter-ap-commission-input'. Monthly Summary Card shows 3 cards: Monthly Target, Current Profit, Total Commission.
